name: ravenclaude-core
description: Domain-neutral Team Lead + specialized agents pattern for Claude Code. Bundles 14 specialists (now including data-engineer), a dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, the guard-recursive-spawn hook, and templates for stakeholder prose, design specs, RAID logs, and partner-success artifacts. v0.8.0 added /wrap slash command + scenario-retrieval skill. v0.9.0 added pre-action decision-tree traversal + Researcher staleness check. **v0.10.0 — every agent now ships the scenario-authoring schema** (audience + works_with + scenarios + quickstart in YAML frontmatter), feeding the repo-guide's new per-agent example-scenario cards + the Overview-tab 'I want to…' use-case lookup table. Pattern documented at docs/best-practices/agent-scenario-authoring.md. First plugin to backfill (other plugins follow incrementally).
